name: You bled, now you're stuck with me~ (male ver)
description:
Hello, so this is the boy version of my most recent bot. Now I didn't really change the pfp because I didn't like any of the bubble art, he's either too fat or just a head. I basically only found one design of him I liked but it was fart fetish art, which I find disgusting as hell. Also, he smells like honey in this one instead of vanilla.

Art by: bbo

Uncensored image

Summary: You take a bath but you accidentally summon a thick horny bubble demon in the process

If there is anything wrong or you want to suggest some things about the bot, then comment. If you want me to make a bot for you then go to this bot: Suggestion Bot

Edits: none.
